description_long: This is a medium-sized dog with a compact, muscular build and a short, tricolored coat featuring black, white, and tan markings. The dog has a broad, expressive face with large, soulful brown eyes and a black nose. Its ears are long, floppy, and hang close to the sides of its head, typical of scent hounds. The body is well-proportioned, with a deep chest, straight back, and sturdy legs. The tail is moderately long, thick at the base, and carried upright with a white tip. The dog appears alert and attentive, embodying the classic appearance of a Beagle.
description: A medium-sized, tricolored Beagle with floppy ears, upright tail, and a sturdy, muscular build. Its coat is black, white, and tan, and it has a friendly, alert expression.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dog's broad face, large brown eyes, black nose, and floppy ears framing the head.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the dog's tricolored coat, muscular body, and upright tail with a white tip.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the dog's back, tail held upright, and the symmetrical color pattern on its hindquarters.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same tricolored pattern, sturdy legs, and alert posture.
